use_cases: Hero section headline animations with character dispersion effects
Interactive CTA buttons with text that scatters on hover
Brand name or logo text reveal animations on landing pages
Portfolio or creative agency website typography effects
Interactive headlines that engage users on scroll or hover
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-powered text animation component that splits text into individual characters and disperses them in unique directions with rotation on hover. Each character receives a custom transform with x, y, and rotationZ values, creating an organic scatter effect. Supports onHover callbacks for integration with parent components.
